description_long: This object is a classic hot dog nestled in a soft, split-top bun, presented on a crinkled white paper tray. The sausage is a warm reddish-brown color, topped with a generous squiggle of bright yellow mustard. Slices of green pickles and small white onion pieces are visible along the sides of the sausage, adding texture and color contrast. The bun appears fluffy and slightly golden, with the paper tray providing a casual, street-food presentation. The overall appearance is appetizing and typical of a hot dog served at urban food stands or parks. No grill marks are visible on the sausage or bun.
description: A hot dog with mustard, pickles, and onions in a soft bun, served in a white paper tray. The presentation is colorful and typical of street food.
description_view_0: Side view showing the hot dog nestled in the bun with the paper tray's crinkled edge visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the mustard squiggle, pickles, and onions on the sausage, with the bun split open.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the bun and paper tray edges visible.
description_view_3: Angled top view emphasizing the toppings and the open bun, with the paper tray fanned out.
